project.name: The Sims 4 Translator
project.description: A PySide6 desktop application for translating The Sims 4 mod package strings, saving dictionaries, exporting translated packages, and generating/verifying synthetic package smoke fixtures.

tour.title: Project Overview and Startup
tour.description: Start with README, requirements, and main.py to understand purpose and bootstrapping.

tour.title: Package Load, Dedupe, and Background Tasks
tour.description: Follow storage and task modules for package parsing, dedupe, async export, save, and finalize.

tour.title: Main UI Workflows
tour.description: Review the main window, import dialog, export dialog, and job drawer for user-facing behavior.

tour.title: Synthetic Package Smoke Coverage
tour.description: Use scripts and synthetic integration tests to generate and verify GUI smoke packages without real mod files.
